steps.title: Use the contrast in forms
steps.content: The passage contrasts recognizable literary forms such as the short story with rarer "intergeneric" forms that are hard to classify. The blank describes the recognizable, conventional category.

steps.title: Reject ambiguity words
steps.content: A means uncertain, C means between two things, and D means not favoring either side; none describes established literary forms. The remaining word means conventional or traditional. The answer is B.
